name: Grove TB6612FNG Motor Drive
description: The Grove TBB6612FNG a runs over I²C bus and has the capability to control DC and Stepper motors. At the current stage of implementation only DC motor is implemented.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver. Defaults to `0x14`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this TB6612FNG component.
